firebase_web_api_key.justification: Firebase web client API key is public-by-design. Per CLAUDE.md Security Notes: 'Firebase API key in client code is normal and expected — Firebase keys are restricted by Firestore rules, not secrecy.' Same key in all three files (web app, service worker, legacy).

scanner_pattern_definitions.justification: These files contain regex definitions for the credential-detection patterns. They are the scanner itself, not exposed credentials.

env_example_template.justification: Template file showing the shape of .env without real values. Explicitly allowed by .gitignore via !.env.example.

firebaserc_project_id.justification: Project ID is public information (visible in app URL, hosted site). Not a credential.

pickaxe_hits_explained.private_key_block_marker: Only match is in 5ef9833d (Phase 1 setup) introducing the secrets-scanner hook which contains the pattern as a detection regex, not a credential.
pickaxe_hits_explained.stripe_live_prefix: Matches in 5ef9833d (scanner) and 59e88376 (V1-V6 hardening introducing husky pre-commit pattern). Both are scanner pattern definitions.

tracked_sensitive_inventory.verdict: Both intentional and safe per justifications above.

firebase_rules_baseline.architecture_note: v8.0.0-rc1 full rewrite — explicit per-collection match blocks, no catch-all, list-query-compatible rule patterns per CLAUDE.md.

storage_rules_baseline.note: storage.rules does not exist in repo. If Firebase Storage is in use, default Firebase rules apply — by default these deny all access until rules are deployed. Tracked as informational finding.

root_package.notes: All 8 LOW are transitive via firebase-admin dev tree (test/build context only, not shipped to clients).

functions_package.notes: fast-xml-builder + protobufjs HIGH are transitive via firebase-admin / firebase-functions. Fix available via semver-major firebase-admin@10.3.0 — review for breakage before applying.

amd_018_baseline.note: All recent firestore.rules commits are version-tagged ships (v7.x, v8.x) which means they passed through the Founder-authorized ship system. No bypass-pattern commits detected.
